channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: UK Army Air-Drops Medical Support To Remote Island Battling Hantavirus

media:content.media:description: One of the three British nationals diagnosed with Hantavirus is on the South Atlantic island.

item.description: One of the three British nationals diagnosed with suspected hantavirus connected to the outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship is currently on the island
item.content:encoded: One of the three British nationals diagnosed with suspected hantavirus connected to the outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship is currently on the island

item.title: Why Brain Implants Are More Than A Sci-Fi Fantasy

media:content.media:description: Neuralink leads with implants in 20 patients and aims for 20,000 implants annually by 2031.

item.description: The technology is still nascent and the number of people who have received implants is only in the hundreds.
item.content:encoded: The technology is still nascent and the number of people who have received implants is only in the hundreds.

item.title: Hantavirus Case Confirmed As Evacuated American Passenger Tests Positive, Another French Passenger Falls Ill
item.description: Passengers evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship began flying home aboard military and government planes Sunday after the vessel anchored in the Canary Islands.
item.content:encoded: Passengers evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship began flying home aboard military and government planes Sunday after the vessel anchored in the Canary Islands.

item.title: Iran's Fact Check As Satellites Show Suspected Oil Leak Near Kharg Island

media:content.media:description: This satellite image obtained from Copernicus Sentinel Data 2026 on May 8

item.description: The incident comes as the Trump administration ramps up "Economic Fury" on Tehran, tightening sanctions and increasing the US naval presence near Hormuz to curb Iran's oil exports.
item.content:encoded: The incident comes as the Trump administration ramps up "Economic Fury" on Tehran, tightening sanctions and increasing the US naval presence near Hormuz to curb Iran's oil exports.

item.title: Iran Made A '3rd Country' Offer On Uranium Stockpile To US: Report

media:content.media:description: Conflict has raised energy prices and disrupted oil flows through the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

item.description: The US president proposed that Iran permit passage through the Strait of Hormuz and Washington end its blockade on Iranian ports in the next month.
item.content:encoded: The US president proposed that Iran permit passage through the Strait of Hormuz and Washington end its blockade on Iranian ports in the next month.

item.title: Indian-Origin Philanthropist Pays Off Student Loans For 176 Graduates In US: "Pursue Your Goals"

media:content.media:description: He tied the gesture to his father's story.

item.description: The announcement drew a standing ovation from stunned students and families, as for many, the relief is life-changing.
item.content:encoded: The announcement drew a standing ovation from stunned students and families, as for many, the relief is life-changing.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: Trump Warns Iran Against Moving Uranium, Says US Keeping An Eye
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

item.title: US Man Sets World Record With Massive Collection Of 3,482 Bearbrick Toy

media:content.media:description: Bearbricks were first introduced in 2001 by Tatsuhiko Akashi.

item.description: He collected an impressive 3,482 pieces of merchandise from the popular Bearbrick brand.
item.content:encoded: He collected an impressive 3,482 pieces of merchandise from the popular Bearbrick brand.

item.title: Hantavirus Surveillance: India Deploys 165-Lab 'Viral Shield' To Track Virus Spread

media:content.media:description: The ICMR has activated the viral shield protocol to contain the spread of hantavirus

item.description: he Indian Council of Medical Research has activated the Viral Shield protocol to make sure the Andes strain doesn't breach the country's borders. Here is how their measures can protect the people from the deadly infection.
item.content:encoded: he Indian Council of Medical Research has activated the Viral Shield protocol to make sure the Andes strain doesn't breach the country's borders. Here is how their measures can protect the people from the deadly infection.

item.title: Iran Formalises Hormuz Toll Process: How, Which Nations Will Get Permits

media:content.media:description: The form reportedly contains over 40 questions requiring shipping vessels to also disclose all their info

item.description: Iran has previously warned that it would deny passage through Hormuz to ships linked to the US or Israel, while others may only transit with Iranian consent. India and Pakistan are among the nations that have negotiated with Tehran to secure passage
item.content:encoded: Iran has previously warned that it would deny passage through Hormuz to ships linked to the US or Israel, while others may only transit with Iranian consent. India and Pakistan are among the nations that have negotiated with Tehran to secure passage

item.title: Jailed Iranian Nobel Laureate Gets Bail, Moved To Hospital In Tehran

media:content.media:description: Narges Mohammadi suffered a heart attack two weeks ago.

item.description: Iran's imprisoned Nobel Peace Prize winner Narges Mohammadi has been moved to a hospital in the capital, Tehran, and has been granted a suspension of her sentence on heavy
item.content:encoded: Iran's imprisoned Nobel Peace Prize winner Narges Mohammadi has been moved to a hospital in the capital, Tehran, and has been granted a suspension of her sentence on heavy

item.title: Video: Turkish Airlines Plane Tyre Catches Fire During Landing In Nepal

media:content.media:description: Passengers on board the aircraft were evacuated using the emergency doors.

item.description: Turkish Airlines aircraft caught fire on right tyres during landing at Tribhuvan Airport, passengers evacuated safely.
item.content:encoded: Turkish Airlines aircraft caught fire on right tyres during landing at Tribhuvan Airport, passengers evacuated safely.

item.title: Israel Gets $3.8 Billion US Military Aid A Year. Netanyahu Wants It To Be 0

media:content.media:description: The US has agreed to provide a total of $38 billion in military aid to Israel from 2018 to 2028.

item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu hopes to wean Israel off U.S. military support within a decade as his country pushes to strengthen ties with Gulf states, he said in an
item.content:encoded: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu hopes to wean Israel off U.S. military support within a decade as his country pushes to strengthen ties with Gulf states, he said in an

item.title: "Totally Unacceptable": Trump Rejects Iran's Peace Plan, Tehran Responds

media:content.media:description: Since early in the war, Iran has imposed a blockade on the vital Strait of Hormuz

item.description: Iran responded to the US by warning it would not hold back from retaliating against any new US strikes or permit more foreign warships in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Iran responded to the US by warning it would not hold back from retaliating against any new US strikes or permit more foreign warships in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Donald Trump Accepts Xi's Invitation, To Visit China From May 13-15

media:content.media:description: Trump was meant to visit China in late March or early April, but postponed to focus on the Iran war.

item.description: President Donald Trump will visit China from May 13 to 15, Beijing confirmed on Monday, with the US leader expected to discuss Iran and...
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump will visit China from May 13 to 15, Beijing confirmed on Monday, with the US leader expected to discuss Iran and...

item.title: Video: Massive Debris Falls Inside New York City Tunnel, Driver Escapes Serious Injury

media:content.media:description: He was driving home from his overnight shift.

item.description: The man claimed that he isn't seeking a large payout, he just wants coverage for his car repairs.
item.content:encoded: The man claimed that he isn't seeking a large payout, he just wants coverage for his car repairs.

item.title: Motorcycle Left Hanging From Traffic Light After Crash In Canada, Rider Injured

media:content.media:description: Photos and videos shared online showed the motorcycle suspended above the intersection.

item.description: Police said Scott Road was closed between 70th Avenue and 72nd Avenue while crews worked to clear debris from the roadway following the crash.
item.content:encoded: Police said Scott Road was closed between 70th Avenue and 72nd Avenue while crews worked to clear debris from the roadway following the crash.

item.title: "They Will Be Laughing No Longer": Trump's Latest Threat To Iran
item.description: "They Will Be Laughing No Longer": Trump's Latest Threat To Iran
item.content:encoded: "They Will Be Laughing No Longer": Trump's Latest Threat To Iran

item.title: Iran Responds To US Peace Plan, As Fresh Drone Attacks Rattle Ceasefire

media:content.media:description: Fresh drone attacks in the Gulf on Sunday were the latest to rattle the ceasefire.

item.description: Netanyahu said on Sunday that Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium must be removed before the US-Israeli war against Iran could be considered finished.
item.content:encoded: Netanyahu said on Sunday that Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium must be removed before the US-Israeli war against Iran could be considered finished.

item.title: Trump Says US Could Hit 'Every Target' In Iran In 2 Weeks

media:content.media:description: On NATO, he said the alliance "has proven to be a paper tiger. They weren't there to help."

item.description: The comments come as Iran is reported to have responded to the latest US proposal on ending a conflict that began on February 28 with US and Israeli strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: The comments come as Iran is reported to have responded to the latest US proposal on ending a conflict that began on February 28 with US and Israeli strikes on Iran.
